item.rufrix.test_item: VERY highly detailed test item that has a very high chance to kill you when consumed.
sound.rufrix.doyouarehavestupid: bro why did you use that thing
tooltip.rufrix.test_item: Please don't use it. Instead, have you tried surrounding a dirt block with this thing in a crafting table?
message.rufrix.upercore_cannot_open: Hm, perhaps I could smash it against bedrock or obsidian...?
tooltip.rufrix.uper_core: Smash it against REALLY hard rocks
tooltip.rufrix.freakyman.1: It's the ONE, the FIRST, the ONLY original Freakyman!
tooltip.rufrix.freakyman.2: From the (now deceased) hit game Rooms of Gaiana!
tooltip.rufrix.freakyman.3: Now you can have your VERY own personal freak assistant 24/7
tooltip.rufrix.freakyman.4: DO NOT, UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES, INTERACT WITH THIS BLOCK. THIS IS NOT A DRILL.
tooltip.rufrix.rflintglassnotflinthlun: Told bro he was gonna get a whole block
advancements.rufrix.root.title: Ruflun's Thingamabobs
advancements.rufrix.root.description: More or less useful things added in your world. Have fun!
tooltip.rufrix.raw_mojave.1: It's too soft to be put in a furnace.
tooltip.rufrix.raw_mojave.2: Try pressing it in an ingot mold instead.
tooltip.rufrix.mojave_ores: Cannot be put in a furnace. Harvest it's raw ores instead.
